Class MailService

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.mailing.service.MailService
public abstract class MailService extends Object
Core mail service for handling mail registration, verification, and sending.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MailService(MailServiceConfig config)
    Create a new mail service with the given configuration.

  • Constructor Details

    • MailService

      public MailService(MailServiceConfig config)
      Create a new mail service with the given configuration.
      Parameters:
      config - the configuration

  • Method Details

    • registerAndPromptVerify

      public Result<MailEntry, FailureReason> registerAndPromptVerify(long user, String mail, MailSource source)
      Register a new mail address for a user and send a verification email.
      Parameters:
      user - the user id
      mail - the mail address
      source - the source of the mail registration
      Returns:
      the result of the registration

    • verifyMail

      public @Nullable FailureReason verifyMail(long user, String mailHash, String verificationCode)
      Attempts to verify the mail entry with the given verification code.
      Parameters:
      user - user that owns that mail entry
      mailHash - hash of the mail entry
      verificationCode - verification code to verify with
      Returns:
      a failure reason if the verification failed, otherwise null

    • registerVerifiedMail

      public Result<MailEntry, FailureReason> registerVerifiedMail(long user, String mail, MailSource source)
      Register a verified mail address for a user.
      Parameters:
      user - the user id
      mail - the mail address
      source - the source of the mail registration
      Returns:
      the result of the registration

    • createMailEntry

      public Result<MailEntry, FailureReason> createMailEntry(long user, String mail, MailSource source)
      Create a new MailEntry for a user.
      Parameters:
      user - the user id
      mail - the mail address
      source - the source of the mail registration
      Returns:
      the result containing the mail entry if successful

    • createMailEntry

      protected abstract MailEntry createMailEntry(long user, MailSource source, String mailHash, String mailShort, boolean verified, Instant verificationRequested, String verificationCode)

    • getRetryAfterSeconds

      public long getRetryAfterSeconds(long user)
      Get the time in seconds a user must wait before they can request another verification mail.
      Parameters:
      user - the user id
      Returns:
      the retry after time in seconds

    • mailHash

      public String mailHash(String mail)
      Calculate the hash for the given mail address.
      Parameters:
      mail - the mail address
      Returns:
      the hashed mail address

    • sendMail

      public void sendMail(Mail mail)
      Send an email.
      Parameters:
      mail - the email to send

      Get the configured public host for URLs.
      Returns:
      the host
